parameters.query: SELECT g.register_name, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE g.status = 'PROPOSED') AS pending, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE g.status = 'CONFIRMED') AS confirmed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE g.status = 'REJECTED') AS rejected, r.last_synced_at FROM confidence_gate_log g LEFT JOIN register_metadata r ON r.register_name = g.register_name GROUP BY g.register_name, r.last_synced_at ORDER BY g.register_name;

meta.description: GET /webhook/register-stats — returns per-register counts (pending/confirmed/rejected) for Glance Morning Pulse.
